WATCHER.cardsModifierDescription: Watcher cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
WATCHER.description:
A failed attempt to return to earth using the Holly Hop Drive.
instead lands the boys from The Dwarf at the foot of the Spire.
WATCHER.eventDeathPrevention: I must survive. Balance depends on it.
WATCHER.goldMonologue: [sine]I seek no wealth... but the path demands preparation.[/sine]
WATCHER.title: Red Dwarf
